name: Chakra UI vs Material UI (MUI)
description: Comparison guide: customization flexibility, responsive styling ergonomics, base-style friction, and when MUI is a better fit.

metadata.intent: Decide between Chakra UI and Material UI for a scalable product UI

must_use: Choose based on desired design language + customization needs + performance constraints
must_not: Ignore base-style override friction when targeting a custom brand aesthetic
conventions: If you need strong custom branding at scale, favor systems that are easy to morph; if you want strong defaults, MUI can be faster.

steps.description: Ease of modification: Chakra is prop-first and tends to require less fight-with-base-styles. MUI often requires overriding more base classes and styles to remove the 'material' feel.
Responsive styling: Chakra has built-in responsive prop patterns; MUI often requires explicit responsive styling logic or additional code.
Choose MUI when: you want a large catalog of pre-styled components and the default aesthetic is acceptable with minimal customization.
Choose Chakra when: you want flexible, composable layout primitives and easy overrides for a custom design system as the product scales.
